articles.author: Jenipher Camino Gonzalez
articles.title: Artemis II passes halfway point to Moon, sends Earth photos - dw.com
articles.description: Artemis II is now closer to the Moon than the Earth. The astronauts on board have sent back eye-catching photos of our planet, and fixed a malfunctioning toilet along the way.
articles.content:
The Artemis II mission successfully continued its lunar flyby path, passing the halfway point between the Earth and the Moon, NASA has said.
Artemis II astronauts are the first to fly towards the mo… [+2834 chars]

articles.author: Matt Reigle
articles.title: Artemis II Astronaut Christina Koch Proclaims Herself 'Space Plumber' - OutKick
articles.description: Artemis II astronaut Christina Koch fixes a malfunctioning Orion capsule toilet mid-mission, earning “space plumber" status and saving the crew from a worst-case scenario in orbit.
articles.content:
The four astronauts of the Artemis II mission are on their way to the moon's orbit, but not without an early scare: the toilet stopped working.
Fortunately, it got back online before there was an, u… [+1845 chars]

articles.content: The Planetary Society is deeply disappointed by this budget proposal. The White House's budgeting office has put forward the same budget cuts to NASA and NASA Science that were rejected by overwhelmi… [+1444 chars]
